summary: Tested tracked media system for i'M On Social RMS. All 19 backend API tests passed including: tracked media upload, view page with OG tags, stats endpoint, view deduplication, universal URL wrapping (single and bulk), template auto-wrap on create/update, campaign auto-wrap on update, and training lesson auto-wrap. Frontend loads correctly with login, contacts, and thread/composer pages working.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, contacts, thread pages load without errors)

seed_data_creation: Test images created dynamically using PIL for upload tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tracked media system fully tested. All endpoints working: POST /api/media/upload-tracked, GET /api/media/view/{media_id}, GET /api/media/stats/{media_id}. URL wrapping endpoints tested: POST /api/s/wrap (idempotent), POST /api/s/wrap-bulk. Auto-wrap integration tested for templates, campaigns, and training lessons. Frontend thread page with composer loads correctly. Track Opens toggle only appears when media is selected (requires file upload simulation which was not tested in UI).

tracked_media_view: test_view_tracked_media_returns_html - PASSED (branded HTML with OG tags)
